In step 5 we're going to be updating all the RSS directories with our RSS feed so that they know that we're alive and so they know to advertise our new RSS feed to all of their subscribers. Alright, so this can generate lots and lots of traffic if you hit it with the right topics, if you do your research correctly, and if you use your keywords the right way. After one of them will get us the same address, I'm just going to go ahead and use this one down here. What I'm going to do is I'm going to click on it, copy, and then I'm going to go open my RSS program. Now this program is $50 and if you don't want to use it you don't have to. You can use, you can do it all by hand and it's all free but this program does what would take me two, three hours and about three minutes. So we'll wait for it to open here. All of them I've used, you know I've bought multiple different versions of them, split the test and find out which ones are the best ones and these are the ones that I found are the best. So I'm going to create another feed and so all we do is, you know it opens up here, we're going to create, add feed, we can control, you know paste that into here and if we click on auto fill it's going to go and it's going to find out all the information about our feed and it's going to automatically load them into here which is very nice and convenient. So it's done all that for me and the title's got my keyword in it, the description's got my keyword in it, website's got my keyword in it, click OK and then all I'd have to do now is click on the one that I just added and then I would click the submit button and it would go out to 70 plus RSS directories in about, I don't know, 3, 5 minutes, hour long it takes to submit to them all and I'm done. That's as easy as it is to do with this RSS submit program. You're done, everything's over, it took about 3, 4 minutes to show you that, that's how simple. Now let me show you how to do it by hand. What you're going to do is you're going to go to one of the RSS directories, feedag happens to be one of my favorite ones and then you're going to go up here and you're going to click add feed. You're going to go and you're going to copy your feed address into here, you're going to add a couple descriptive tags, so we're going to do best, I mean for our case study we're using what was it, FaceLifterX3000 and then we got to enter this number here, we're going to prove to them that we're a human and then we're done, we hit save feed and it's done and then we move on to the next directory. So for instance, the next one might be feedh.com, I think I spelled that wrong. But yeah, you log in, you do the same steps that you did on feedhag and you just repeat that until you've done all the different RSS directories.
